# Griffin Long

> A self-taught AI engineer who went from line cook to shipping production agent systems.

I taught myself to build with AI while working as a line cook and taking college classes. In March 2025 I founded GRAIsol, and in the months since have shipped an open-source agent runtime (agent-afk), a 369K-LOC AI GTM-automation platform (AgentGRAI), and 9 published open-source packages. I build and direct the AI agent tooling that lets one person ship at team scale.

## Projects

- [agent-afk](https://agentafk.com): open-source TypeScript agentic coding-agent runtime/harness (~308K LOC, 408 npm versions, Apache-2.0)
- [AgentGRAI](https://graisol.com): Modular Next.js / React AI lead-intelligence and outbound platform with multi-stage enrichment, async queue architecture, Gmail outbound engine, and AI SDR layer (~369K LOC)
- [ElevenLabs Voice MCP](https://github.com/griffinwork40): MCP server for ElevenLabs voice synthesis (23 tools)
- [ClickUp MCP](https://github.com/griffinwork40): MCP server for ClickUp task management (19 tools)
- [Cursor Agent MCP](https://github.com/griffinwork40): MCP server for Cursor Agent with SSE on Vercel (40 merged PRs)
- [gadscli](https://github.com/griffinwork40): Async Rust CLI for the Google Ads API, published to npm
